ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CCR_Validation_Rules__c), OR ( CONTAINS(Opportunity__r.ETM_Area__c, 'SLED'), CONTAINS(Opportunity__r.ETM_Area__c, 'FED'), CONTAINS(Opportunity__r.ETM_Region__c, 'ANZFEDERAL'), Opportunity__r.Account.Industry_Category__c = 'SLED', Opportunity__r.Account.Industry_Category__c = 'FED', ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Account.Customer_Category__c, 'State & Local Govt/Education'), ISPICKVAL(Opportunity__r.Account.Customer_Category__c, 'Federal Govt') ), ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c, 'Partner Referral Fee'), ISNEW() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: SLED/FED opportunities are not eligible for Partner Referral Fees.
